arts.ttl: Fikayo Tomori shows true colours as ex-Chelsea defender makes huge Tottenham transfer 'decision'
arts.sum: The report states that Postecoglou wants to sign a defender before Monday evening's deadline, and Tomori was one of a few options on the Lilywhites' shortlist . The AC Milan defender has been linked with a move to the Lilywhites this month, as Ange Postecoglou looks to bolster his backline before the January transfer window slams shut on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou proud of Spurs academy players
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou praises Tottenham's teenage academy players after they help steer Spurs to a win 3-0 at home to Elfsborg in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make enquiry for Premier League forward with 16 goals and four assists
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have reportedly made an enquiry for the Chelsea attacker Christopher Nkunku. The 27-year-old has struggled for regular gametime at Chelsea and he needs to move on in search of regular time. According to TBR Football, Tottenham are weighing up a potential move for him this month. arts.ttl: Tottenham have ‘virtually shaken hands’ on transfer – Contracts ready to be signed, need to convince player
arts.sum: Tottenham have an agreement in place with AC Milan for Fikayo Tomori but need to convince him of the move. That’s according to Gazzetta dello Sport, who report that the two sides have agreed a €26.5m deal for the centre back. arts.ttl: Why Mathys Tel has been dropped by Bayern Munich as Tottenham transfer plans take another twist
arts.sum: After rejecting the chance to join Tottenham Hotspur this January, Mathys Tel finds himself omitted from Vincent Kompany's Bayern Munich matchday squad. Multiple sources state that Tel and his current club are assessing all the available options to resolve his future, which won't be with Tottenham following Friday's twist.
